title: Smokers' Guide to 9 Herbal Creams for Angina
description: Echinacea purpurea creams have been traditionally used to help alleviate angina symptoms. They contain properties like alkylamides, glycosides, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. These constituents help reduce inflammation in the blood vessels, improve blood flow, and increase oxygen supply to the heart. This can help ease chest pain and shortness of breath associated with angina.  To use Echinacea purpurea creams for angina, apply a small amount ...
